use_cases: Immersive landing page hero sections with 3D particle effects and scroll-driven animations
Creative studio or agency portfolio showcases with cinematic visual experiences
Product landing pages requiring high-impact visual storytelling
Portfolio or personal brand websites seeking ethereal aesthetic appeal
ai_summary: A premium 3D scroll-hero component featuring Three.js WebGL rendering with UnrealBloom post-processing, GSAP ScrollTrigger animations, and custom GLSL cosine palette shaders. The component displays dynamic text sections that transition as users scroll through a dark, ethereal scene with floating geometric mesh, creating a cinematic brand experience perfect for creative studios, agencies, or SaaS landing pages.
